summary: Strong performance highlighted by a stellar SOTM and big RR Blues, though recording details are unclear
review: The reviewer praises the show, calling the SOTM "STELLAR" and noting a powerful RR Blues in the second set, making it a solid outing for an otherwise uneven year. No comments on the source or audio fidelity were provided, leaving the recording quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic 4‑star review highlights strong musical moments but gives no information on recording quality, so rating leans on show performance with modest confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments regarding soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall positive impression; strong second‑set highlight with RR Blues despite the reviewer noting the year as generally subpar.
